title: Unlock the power of nanoscience
para1: Maksym Yarema is a researcher, educator, and science communicator dedicated to exploring nanomaterials for sustainable electronics, energy technologies, and next-generation memory devices.
para2: With over 17 years of research experience and major grants including the ERC Starting Grant and SNSF Ambizione Fellowship, Maksym bridges the gap between cutting-edge science and human understanding.
